creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
kde@ would like to request a new exp-run with the attached patch.
 - updates to devel/cmake 3.10.1 which has been released in the meantime
 - adds fixes for kdepim4, qt5-webkit
 - adds fix for openvsp
 - adds fix for scalapack (which I'm not really happy with)

No local build failures on 11.1 amd64
